title: xtra Juicy IRISH Potatoes Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring tender potatoes, rich truffle oil, and a hint of Irish flair. Perfect for post-workout fuel or a cozy evening meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
Pierce the potatoes with a fork to prevent bursting.
Bake the potatoes in a bain-marie for 45 minutes, or until tender.
In a saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Whisk in the flour to make a roux, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking constantly to prevent lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the truffle oil, cheddar cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and slice in half lengthwise.
Spoon the cheese sauce over the potatoes and top with additional shredded cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
